pages.text:
**NOTARIAL WILL / TESTAMENT**
**Document ID: will_012**
**Date of Deed: 30 November 2020**
**Place of Execution: Bruges, Belgium**
**Notary: Meester Jan Claes, Bruges**

---

**I. IDENTIFICATION OF TESTATOR**

I, Hendrik Janssen, born on the 15th day of March 1948, residing at [insert address], Bruges, Belgium,
hereby declare this document to be my last will and testament, hereby revoking any and all prior wills or
testamentary dispositions made by me, unless explicitly confirmed herein.

---

**II. TESTAMENTARY DECLARATIONS**

**Article 1: General Principles**
I express my intention to facilitate a fair distribution of my estate among my heirs, particularly my
children, Thomas Janssen and Emma Janssen. I wish to ensure that any prior gifts or donations made to
my children or any other beneficiaries are treated as advancements on their inheritance and will be taken
into account in the equalization of my estate in accordance with Belgian law.

**Article 2: Distribution of Residue**
Upon my death, I direct that the residue of my estate, after payment of debts, taxes, and expenses, shall
be divided equally between my two children, Thomas Janssen and Emma Janssen, each receiving fifty
percent (50%) of the remaining estate.

**Article 3: Specific Legacy**
I bequeath to my granddaughter, Sophie Janssen, the specific sum of twenty-five thousand euros
(€25,000), which shall be paid to her from the residue of my estate prior to the division of the remaining
assets among my children.

---

**III. REVOCATION OF PRIOR DISPOSITIONS**
I hereby revoke all prior wills and testamentary dispositions made by me, unless they are expressly
confirmed herein. This revocation shall include any codicils or other documents that may have been
executed prior to this date.

---

**IV. RESIDUARY CLAUSE**
In the event that either of my children, Thomas Janssen or Emma Janssen, predeceases me, their share of

the residue of my estate shall be distributed equally among their descendants, per stirpes.

**Article 4: Advancement Clause**
I direct that any advancements made to my children, Thomas Janssen and Emma Janssen, prior to my
death, shall be taken into account when distributing my estate, ensuring that the total value received by
each child reflects an equitable distribution of my estate’s value.

---

**V. EXECUTOR**
I hereby appoint [insert name of executor], residing at [insert address], as the executor of this will.
Should [insert name of executor] be unable or unwilling to serve, I appoint [insert alternate name of
executor], residing at [insert alternate address], as an alternate executor.

---

**VI. CLOSING**
In witness whereof, I, Hendrik Janssen, have executed this last will and testament on the 30th day of
November 2020, in the presence of Meester Jan Claes, Notary, and the undersigned witnesses, who have
signed below at my request and in my presence.

**Signature of Testator:**
_____________________________
Hendrik Janssen

**Signature of Notary:**
_____________________________
Meester Jan Claes, Notary, Bruges, Belgium

**Witness Signatures:**
1. _____________________________
  [Insert name of witness 1]
2. _____________________________
  [Insert name of witness 2]

---

This document has been executed and is hereby certified to be the last will and testament of Hendrik
Janssen, dated as noted above.
**Given in Bruges, Belgium, this 30th day of November 2020.**
